technicalLearnings.lesson: sp_updateextendedproperty requires sql_variant type for @value. CAST(N'...' AS SQL_VARIANT) works inline but fails when passed through PowerShell variables. Solution: generate pure SQL file with N'...' literals via PowerShell, then execute via Invoke-Sqlcmd -InputFile.

sp_rename on a column fails if an index references that column. Must DROP INDEX first, rename column, then CREATE INDEX with new name. The rename script should handle index dependencies before column renames.

Git stash pop with conflicts keeps the stash entry (unlike clean apply which drops it). After resolving conflicts, must git add the resolved files before commit. Commands must run in order: add → commit → push.
Windows-MCP Shell swallows stdout from python subprocess calls and Start-Process with -RedirectStandardOutput. For Python script output, write to file then read, or use Invoke-Sqlcmd for DB work.
